url.msg: URL contains underscores ('_'), recommendation is to use hyphens as separators ('-')

title.msg: Title is a good length at 52 characters between 7 and 60 characters

canonical.msg: Found a canonical URL which is valuable for search engines this is a the master copy of the page

headers.msg: You should at least have an H1 header on the page, and a good balance of headers indicates solid content structure
